snapshot.content: Cycle 260: Completed the action.yml design spec for the GitHub Action goal. The spec defines a composite (shell-based) action with 3 required inputs (supabase_project_id, supabase_service_key, anthropic_api_key), 7 optional inputs, 4 outputs, and a 6-step flow: install CLI → configure MCP → sync → execute cycle → commit/push → set outputs. Key design decision: CLAUDE.md defines agent behavior (no separate cycle_script input), keeping user config to 3 secrets + 5 lines of YAML. Next task is implementing action.yml and the entrypoint script.
snapshot.current_focus: Next cycle: Implement action.yml and entrypoint script (task sort_order 30). Design spec at artifacts/research/action-design.md.

pending_tasks.title: Create example workflow and usage documentation
Validate action schema and test with act or dry-run
Push action to repo and verify marketplace discoverability
